testcase.name: Verify user can add product to cart
testcase.system-out: Given user open tutorials ninja home........................................passed When user search product for cart...........................................passed And user click add to cart button...........................................passed Then product should be added to cart successfully...........................passed

testcase.name: Verify login with valid credentials
testcase.system-out: Given user open tutorials ninja website.....................................passed When user click on my account...............................................passed And user click on login.....................................................passed And user enter email and password...........................................passed Then user click login button................................................passed And user navigate to account page...........................................passed

testcase.name: Verify user logout successfully
testcase.system-out: Given user login into tutorials ninja application...........................passed When user click my account dropdown.........................................passed And user click logout option................................................passed Then user should logout successfully........................................passed

testcase.name: Verify user can remove item from cart
Verify user registration - #1.1
testcase.system-out: Given user open registration page...........................................passed When user enter firstname Surya.............................................passed And user enter lastname Prakash.............................................passed And user enter register email dynamic.......................................passed And user enter telephone 9876543210.........................................passed And user enter password Surya123............................................passed Then user click continue button.............................................passed And account should be created successfully..................................passed

testcase.name: Verify user registration - #1.2
testcase.system-out: Given user open registration page...........................................passed When user enter firstname Arun..............................................passed And user enter lastname Kumar...............................................passed And user enter register email dynamic.......................................passed And user enter telephone 9876543211.........................................passed And user enter password Arun123.............................................passed Then user click continue button.............................................passed And account should be created successfully..................................passed

testcase.name: Verify product search
testcase.system-out: Given user open home page...................................................passed When user enter product in search box.......................................passed And user click search button................................................passed Then searched product should display........................................passed
